microphone.denied_description: This tuner needs access to your microphone to identify the played notes.
microphone.incompatible_description: Your browser does not support the audio capture required for this tuner.

instructions.title: Quick Instructions
instructions.step1: Click 'Start Tuner' and grant permission to use the microphone.
instructions.step2: Pluck a single string at a time. The tuner runs in automatic chromatic mode.
instructions.step3: Watch the indicator: if it's on the left, the string is flat; if on the right, it is sharp.
instructions.step4: Tighten or loosen the string until the center glows green and displays 'In Tune'.

cookies.text: Bkappi Tuner uses browser local storage (localStorage) to save your instrument and layout preferences. We do not collect any personal or audio data.
cookies.modal_text:
To guarantee the best user experience, Bkappi Tuner saves locally on your device your choice of instrument (Acoustic Guitar, Electric Guitar, Bass) and your preferred visualization (Needle, Speedometer, Strobe).

🔒 **Your Privacy is Sacred:**
• We do not use tracking or third-party cookies.
• We do not collect, store, or transmit any audio data.
• All audio signal processing is done 100% locally inside your browser via Web Audio API.

By accepting, you agree to the use of local storage strictly to save your tuner preferences.
